title: Secrets.
content:
Three secrets that never were said:
    The stir of the sap in the spring,
    The desire of a man to a maid,
    The urge of a poet to sing.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Bliss Carman (William) delivers a powerful performance in "Secrets."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
